coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Supra-maximal efforts. Your lungs will remember every second of this.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is VO2max work. You're pushing your aerobic ceiling higher.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Supra-maximal efforts drive maximal oxygen uptake and aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Go hard but controlled. Breathe through the discomfort.
